title: Dynimite sticks plus
description: Explode the world with nine dynimite sticks
body:
Bigger and funner version of original! of (Dynimite stick)


add
-standart stick 
craft
gunpowder and sand - stick
tnt - 5 sticks

-2x dynimite stick
4 dynimite sticks 

-3x stick
4 2x dynimite sticks 

-4x stick
4 3x dynimite sticks 

-nuke dynimite
pufferfish and 4 4x sticks

-cluster of dynimite
8 dynimite sticks and string

-cluster of clusters 
8 clusters and string

-cluster of clusters of clusters
8 clusters of clusters and string
(chaos)

-Explosion eater
2 4x stick and nether starr
(eat world and then explode)
